attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT,
BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
  ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG,
FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
PROCESS_DATE_RK,
'=' AS PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,
REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
RTNR_UNIQUE_ID,
XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  FROM
 (  
  SELECT 
  NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,  CASE 
 WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
 ELSE 'N'
END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
--,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,NBMFOD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_RTE_INCR NBMFOD
INNER JOIN 
 ( 
 SELECT  
   EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , 
   DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT AS PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,
   SALES_REP_NUM AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, 
   SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
   FROM 
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_RTE_TRX_OVL 
   WHERE BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN( 'CX')
    ) NAOVRLY
ON NAOVRLY.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NBMFOD.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
 WHERE 1=1 --TYPE_CODE ='ERP'
    AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL WHERE NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
   AND NBMFOD.LINE_CREATION_DATE     BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) 
    AND NBMFOD.LINE_CREATION_DATE >=(SELECT CAST(LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE TABLE_NAME ='RTE_START_DATE' AND job_stream_id='wf_FY22_START_DATE') 
    UNION ALL

 SELECT 
  NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,  CASE 
 WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
 ELSE 'N'
END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
--,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,NBMFOD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_RTE_INCR NBMFOD
INNER JOIN 
 ( 
 SELECT  
   EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , 
   DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT AS PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,
   SALES_REP_NUMBER AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, 
   --SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
          SUM(TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD) SUMS_LINE,
CASE WHEN SUMS_LINE <>0 THEN (TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT/SUMS_LINE)*100 ELSE 0 END RATIO ,
   CASE WHEN BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT<0 THEN RATIO
ELSE SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT END AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
   BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
   FROM 
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR 
   WHERE BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN( 'CX')
       ) NAOVRLY
ON NAOVRLY.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NBMFOD.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
 WHERE 1=1 --TYPE_CODE ='ERP'
    AND   EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL WHERE NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
   AND NBMFOD.LINE_CREATION_DATE     BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) 
    AND NBMFOD.LINE_CREATION_DATE >=(SELECT CAST(LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE TABLE_NAME ='RTE_START_DATE' AND job_stream_id='wf_FY22_START_DATE'
) 
       UNION ALL

 SELECT 
  NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,  CASE 
 WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
 ELSE 'N'
END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
--,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,NBMFOD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_RTE_INCR NBMFOD
INNER JOIN 
 ( 
 SELECT  
   EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , 
   DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT AS PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,
   SALES_REP_NUMBER AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, 
   --SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
          SUM(TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD) SUMS_LINE,
CASE WHEN SUMS_LINE <>0 THEN (TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT/SUMS_LINE)*100 ELSE 0 END RATIO ,
   CASE WHEN BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT<0 THEN RATIO
ELSE SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT END AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
   BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   FROM 
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR 
   WHERE BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN( 'CX')
       ) NAOVRLY
ON NAOVRLY.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NBMFOD.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION SMC
ON NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY  = SMC.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
AND  SMC.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SMC.SALES_MOTION_CD IN ('RENEW')
AND SMC.DV_TRX_TYPE = 'AR'
WHERE TYPE_CODE ='ERP'
     AND NBMFOD.LINE_CREATION_DATE >=(SELECT CAST(LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE TABLE_NAME ='RTE_START_DATE' AND job_stream_id='wf_FY22_START_DATE'
) 
           UNION ALL

 SELECT 
  NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,  CASE 
 WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
 ELSE 'N'
END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
--,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,NBMFOD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_RTE_INCR NBMFOD
INNER JOIN 
 ( 
 SELECT  
   EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , 
   DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT AS PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,
   SALES_REP_NUMBER AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, 
   --SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
          SUM(TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD) SUMS_LINE,
CASE WHEN SUMS_LINE <>0 THEN (TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT/SUMS_LINE)*100 ELSE 0 END RATIO ,
   CASE WHEN BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT<0 THEN RATIO
ELSE SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT END AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
   BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   FROM 
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_RTE_TRX_OLY_RTNR 
   WHERE BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN( 'CX')
       ) NAOVRLY
ON NAOVRLY.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NBMFOD.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION SMC
ON NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY  = SMC.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
AND  SMC.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SMC.SALES_MOTION_CD IN ('RENEW')
AND SMC.DV_TRX_TYPE IN('AR_N','AR')
WHERE TYPE_CODE ='XAAS'
  AND NBMFOD.LINE_CREATION_DATE >=(SELECT CAST(LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
--WHERE TABLE_NAME ='FY22_START_DATE'
WHERE TABLE_NAME ='RTE_START_DATE' AND job_stream_id='wf_FY22_START_DATE'
)) A
